about.title: About Us
about.description: Grand Oliva is a leading company in manufacturing and exporting the finest olives and pickles. Founded by a family passionate about quality and authentic taste, we pride ourselves on delivering products that satisfy all our customers' tastes.
about.mission_text: To deliver the finest natural olives and pickles with the highest quality standards and authentic taste
about.vision_text: To be the first choice in olives and pickles across the Arab world and internationally
